title: Atomic State Writes in state.lua
summary: Implemented atomic state writes in state.lua using temp file + rename + fsync pattern. Modified save() to write to temp file (state.json.tmp.<pid>.<random>), fsync for durability, then atomic rename to target. Added comprehensive error handling with vim.uv.fs_* detailed messages and temp file cleanup on all error paths. Added 2 new tests: temp file cleanup verification and data integrity test. Updated existing tests to mark atomic writes and error info as FIXED. All 22 state tests pass.
